Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for Terraform pricing-related discussions using search_emails (query: "Terraform pricing" or "Terraform discount" or "volume discount" or similar).
OE 2: Search emails for additional Terraform context using search_emails (query: "Terraform" or "Vantage Distributed" or "Rachel Nguyen" or similar).
OE 3: Search Slack for Terraform-related messages using conversations_search_messages (query: "Terraform" or "Terraform Digital" or "Vantage Distributed" or similar).
OE 4: Search CRM for the Terraform Digital company record using crm_search_companies (name: "Terraform" or "Vantage Distributed" or similar).
OE 5: Search QuickBooks for the existing customer record using quickbooks_search_customers (criteria: DisplayName contains "Vantage" or "Terraform" or similar).
OE 6: Search QuickBooks for the existing Terraform estimate using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria: CustomerRef or DocNumber contains "terraform" or "est_terraform" or similar) or quickbooks_read_invoice (invoice_id: "est_terraform_q2_batch1_2026").
OE 7: Search QuickBooks for the Mosaic Robotics invoice using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria: DocNumber "INV-2026-0411" or CustomerRef contains "Mosaic" or similar) and read the invoice details.
OE 8: Search Airtable for Terraform relocation records by first listing bases using airtable_list_bases and tables using airtable_list_tables to find the Relocations table, then searching using airtable_search_records (query: "Terraform" or "Priya Dasgupta" or "Marcus Liu" or "Samantha Obi" or similar).
OE 9: Search Linear for Terraform-related issues using linear_list_issues (query: "Terraform" or "Vantage" or "invoice" or similar).
OE 10: Create a new QuickBooks customer record under the correct name using quickbooks_create_customer (DisplayName: "Terraform Digital", CompanyName: "Terraform Digital", and other fields carried over from the existing Vantage Distributed record — address: 200 West Madison Street Suite 3100, Chicago IL 60606, PrimaryPhone: (415) 959-9331, PrimaryEmailAddr: rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com). This replaces the legacy "Vantage Distributed" record with the current company name.
OE 11: Create the final invoice in QuickBooks using quickbooks_create_invoice (customer_ref: the new Terraform Digital customer ID, line_items with the correct pricing based on the investigation findings). The agent must determine the appropriate line items and amounts — whether to use per-service pricing ($6,560 total at $1,000/$20/$500 per service per move + $2,000 stipend) or the $2,500/move bundled rate from the CRM deal ($7,500 total), considering the pricing discussions, the reply-all incident, Marcus's approved tiered structure which calls for standard rates on the first batch, and Marcus's note about Marcus Liu's moving coordination line potentially needing to be higher ($700-800 for specialty packing).
OE 12: Update the Terraform Digital CRM deal stage using crm_update_deal_stage (deal_id: "deal-terraform-q2-reloc-batch1", dealstage: a stage reflecting that invoicing is now in progress, such as "contractsent" or similar). This updates the deal from its current "qualification" stage to reflect that the invoice is being finalized.
OE 13: Look up the #finance Slack channel ID using channels_list to find C005 (#finance). Post a summary message in #finance using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C005") with the Terraform Digital invoice pricing breakdown, the customer record update from "Vantage Distributed" to "Terraform Digital," and key findings from the pricing investigation - including the agreed standard rates for the first batch, the reply-all incident context, and the flag about Marcus Liu's potentially higher moving coordination cost. This is so Alejandro can track the final pricing decisions.
OE 14: Look up Marcus Thorne's email address using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Marcus Thorne" or similar). Discovers marcus.thorne@moveops.com. This lookup is needed before sending the review email.
OE 15: Send an email using send_email from hana.kim@moveops.com to marcus.thorne@moveops.com with the corrected invoice for review. The email should include: the finalized Terraform Digital invoice details (line items and total), a note that the QuickBooks customer record has been updated from "Vantage Distributed" to "Terraform Digital," confirmation that the Mosaic invoice was used as a consistency check, a summary of the pricing situation discovered (the internal pricing discussion, the tiered discount structure, and the reply-all incident that exposed pricing to Rachel Nguyen), a flag that the invoice attachment safety check ticket is still in backlog (relevant given the Sunbelt precedent), a note that no Airtable relocation records exist yet for the three Terraform employees, and the CRM deal stage has been updated.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
